site.footer_tagline: A London-based digital studio crafting websites, apps, AI systems and growth engines for UK businesses.

home.hero_lead: We design and engineer websites, mobile apps, generative AI systems and ERP/CRM platforms that turn your business goals into measurable outcomes.
home.services_subhead: From discovery to launch and beyond — design, engineering, AI and growth working as one team.
home.process_subhead: Weekly demos. Real ownership. No agency theatre.
home.testimonials_subhead: Real outcomes from real teams. A few words from people we've shipped with recently.
home.testimonial_1_quote: Eserve rebuilt our checkout in six weeks. Conversion went up 31%, and our team finally enjoys shipping again.
home.testimonial_2_quote: They built a custom AI assistant on our private data — the support team is twice as fast and the answers are right.
home.cta_subhead: Tell us a little about your idea — we'll get back within one working day with a clear next step.

about.hero_lead: We are designers, engineers, AI specialists and SEO professionals working as a single team — to build digital products that move real numbers, not just look good in a portfolio.
about.story_heading: We started Eserve Infotech to make software companies actually want to work with.
about.story_p1: Most agencies treat clients like tickets. We don't. From the first call we behave like an internal team — short meetings, weekly demos, real ownership of outcomes.
about.story_p2: We are headquartered in Croydon, serve clients across the UK and Europe, and lean on a global delivery network for senior engineering and design talent. Our work spans marketing sites, mobile apps, AI assistants, ERP/CRM systems and the SEO that makes them found.
about.principle_1_text: We measure ourselves on the metric that matters to your business — not lines of code.
about.principle_2_text: Weekly demos, working software, screen-recordings. No black boxes, no surprises.
about.principle_3_text: Every engagement is led by senior craft. We don't farm out junior work and call it an agency.
about.principle_4_text: Speed, accessibility and Core Web Vitals are part of the brief, not an afterthought.
about.principle_5_text: Analytics, observability, backups, docs. The unglamorous stuff that keeps you safe.
about.principle_6_text: We're built for multi-year partnerships, not one-and-done launches.

services.hero_lead: Five focused practices, one accountable team. Pick a service or chain several together — most of our clients do both.
services.card_1_desc: Marketing sites, web apps, headless commerce. React, Next.js, WordPress and more.
services.card_2_desc: iOS, Android, React Native and Flutter — UX-led, native-feeling, ready to scale.
services.card_3_desc: RAG copilots, document intelligence, automation agents, custom LLM workflows.
services.card_4_desc: Technical SEO, content engines, conversion optimisation, paid acquisition.
services.card_5_desc: Custom internal tools, sales pipelines, operations dashboards, integrations.

portfolio.hero_lead: A snapshot of recent projects across web, mobile, AI and operations. Each one is live, measured and (in most cases) still being improved.
portfolio.project_1_desc: Headless commerce rebuild. +31% conversion, –48% LCP, 3× organic in 9 months.
portfolio.project_2_desc: RAG copilot trained on shipment data. Halved average resolution time.
portfolio.project_3_desc: Cross-platform app with live sessions, payments and offline workouts.
portfolio.project_4_desc: Replaced 6 spreadsheets with an inventory + manufacturing dashboard.
portfolio.project_5_desc: Brand refresh and Next.js marketing site. Lighthouse 99 across the board.
portfolio.project_6_desc: Email-to-order automation reading messy supplier inboxes with 96% accuracy.
portfolio.project_7_desc: Programmatic UK legal pages. 4× organic traffic in 8 months.
portfolio.project_8_desc: Voice-first iOS app turning field calls into structured CRM entries.
portfolio.project_9_desc: Custom CRM + client portal for a multi-location wellness brand.

contact.hero_lead: Tell us a little about your project. We respond within one working day with a thoughtful first reply — never an auto-response.
contact.form_subhead: Rough is fine. We'll ask the right follow-up questions on a short call.
